content.en:
Somewhere in the Dragon Whisker River, Ye Tian's aura was constricted, looking for the traces of the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

In his hand, he was holding a six-pattern supreme dao weapon, the Taihuang Diagram, which was a weapon exchanged from the Taisu Palace, which could spy on the situation in a distant area.

However, this kind of supreme weapon may not be able to detect it, and some supreme void demons can use secret treasures to hide their figures, and he can also do it.

Therefore, the weapon of the Emperor Diagram is sometimes very pitiful.

Of course, those weaker and poorer Supreme Dao Void Demons will definitely not be able to hide the Emperor Diagram.

Airplanes!

Traces of the Supreme Dao Void Demons appeared on the Emperor Map, and there were several Supreme Dao Void Demons nearby, and their breath was not strong, that is, the Fourfold Extreme Dao Void Demon level.

"That's them!"

Ye Tian quickly shuttled over.

Soon, he found these Quadruple Supreme Dao Void Demons, who were hiding in the shadows of the Taisu River.

However, when Ye Tian arrived, under the distortion of the void, another Supreme Dao Void Demon appeared, this one was a sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon.

"Hahaha, I really caught a Supreme Dao Realm!"

The Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon laughed.

He deliberately let these Supreme Dao Void Demons stay here, waiting to be spied on by the Heavenly Dragon Domain to the Dao Realm with the Supreme Dao Weapon.

Although Ye Tian's cultivation is not high, he is only in the Quadruple Dao Realm, but he can afford to use such a supreme dao weapon that snoops on a far away area, just obtaining this supreme dao weapon is also a big gain!

Rumble!!!!

The Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules broke out, and this Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon collected a six-pattern Supreme Dao weapon spear, and cast an Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Power, and with one shot, many voids were instantly shattered.

The speed of this shot was too fast, enough for the Five Realms to not have the slightest ability to react.

However.

Burst!

This shot pierced the air, and there was no trace of Ye Tian in the surrounding voids.

But in the next moment, his body was wrapped in the seventh sequence of supreme dao rules.

"No!"

Bang!

His body was easily shattered by the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule.

"10,000 combat exploits, not bad!"

Ye Tian's body appeared and muttered.

Killing such a sixfold supreme realm was too easy for him.

In the distance, those Supreme Dao Void Demons saw that the Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon Lord had been killed in seconds, and they were immediately extremely frightened.

Whew!!!

They tried to escape, but Ye Tian flicked his fingers, and several rays of light containing the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao instantly penetrated their bodies, killing them in an instant!

"Mosquitoes are small, but they're also meat!"

Ye Tian also took away the treasures on the bodies of the four Supreme Dao Void Demons.

However, the Fourfold Supreme Dao Void Demon was too poor and didn't have any good things on him, and even this Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon didn't have any good things on him, so it was almost useless to him.

Subsequently.

He took out the Emperor Diagram and continued to search for the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

I have to say that many Supreme Dao Void Demons have laid traps to seduce those weaker Supreme Dao Realms.

In the absence of large-scale wars, this kind of local fighting is like this, and if you are not careful, you will be pitted to death.

But Ye Tian is not afraid, his strength is extremely strong, even if there is a supreme void demon who can compete with him, don't want to kill him easily.

As time passed, Ye Tian killed more and more Supreme Dao Void Demons, and there were many of them who were Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

In a short period of time, he made up two or three hundred thousand battle exploits.

"It's a pity that I didn't encounter the Supreme Dao Void Demon on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List!" Ye Tian muttered.

......

Heavenly Blood Battlefield, Heavenly Blood No. 6 Fortress.

At this time, there were several Sixfold Dao Realm people here discussing the matter on the other side of the Dragon Whisker River.

"Ladies and gentlemen, there have been a lot of calls for help from the Dragon Whisker River, saying that there is a Fourfold Supreme Dao Realm who is crazy about killing our Supreme Dao Void Demon. "

"The Fourfold Supreme Dao Realm can still kill many of our Supreme Dao Void Demons?"

"It should be a fourfold supreme realm who has taken the path of the strongest to the Dao!"

"Originally, there was only one fifth-level supreme realm who took the path of the strongest to the path of the Heavenly Blood Battlefield, and those powerful sixfold supreme realm who took the path of the strongest to the path were almost all in the top third-level battlefield or fourth-level battlefield, and they would not come to the Heavenly Blood Battlefield. "

"Take the Fourfold Supreme Dao Realm of the Supreme Dao Path, even if you comprehend the rules of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao, your strength is at most comparable to the ordinary Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, and you can still do it by killing such a demonic genius, and such a genius, once you kill it, the elders will definitely give a rich reward. "

"Who is going to kill? I need to be stationed here to prevent those powerhouses of the Heavenly Blood and Heavenly Dragon List from attacking here. "

Suddenly, one of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons said, "Let me go!"

This sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon is the eighty-sixth Blood Star of the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, his strength is very terrifying, his physical body and bloodline are far beyond the other Sixfold Supreme Dao realms, no less than the stronger Sevenfold Supreme Dao realm, and he has also comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao, although the realm is not high, but even in the face of the ordinary sevenfold Supreme Dao realm, he can leave calmly.

"Blood Star, if you make a move, you will definitely be able to kill the other party. "

The other Sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demons nodded slightly.

Subsequently, Blood Star Zi left the No. 6 fortress and went to the Dragon Whisker River to kill Ye Tian.

Soon, he came to the Dragon Whisker River, and after receiving a summons from a sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, he immediately used a Supreme Dao weapon to lock Ye Tian's approximate location.

......

"Someone is trying to lock my location!"

Ye Tian guessed that it should be a certain sixfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and it was also a very powerful Supreme Dao Void Demon, otherwise he wouldn't dare to do so.

He can use the seventh sequence of the Supreme Dao rules of the Consummation Realm plus the Supreme Dao weapon that shields and locks the perception to hide himself, so that the other party cannot lock on.

However, he did not do so.

He just waited for the other to come.

Soon.

Here comes the Blood Star.

Rumble!!!!!

Blood Xingzi directly sacrificed a seven-pattern supreme dao weapon, the Blood River Holy Map, and instantly blocked the surrounding area, he didn't want Ye Tian to escape.

"Hahaha, it was you who killed a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons in my Heavenly Blood Vein, and if you meet my Blood Star Son today, you will fall here!"

Blood Star!

Ye Tian smiled.

This is the eighty-sixth Supreme Dao Void Demon on the Heavenly Blood Void Demon List, and it seems that you can get about 1 million battle merits by killing it.

Of course, he didn't underestimate Blood Star either.

He can cross three realms to face the enemy, but a supreme path void demon genius like Blood Xingzi can also cross one realm to kill the enemy.

Therefore, he must go all out in order to have any hope of killing the Blood Star.

Bang!!!!

The two sides collided together in an instant, and both used the seventh sequence to fight with Dao Divine Powers.

As soon as they fought, Blood Star was stunned.

"Your Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule is ......"

His seventh sequence to the Dao rule didn't even reach the one-percent realm, but Ye Tian actually raised the seventh-sequence supreme path rule to the ten-percent perfection realm!
